title: Monotone Theme Maker for Quarto
text: package provides custom Quarto Revealjs theme ggplot2 theme. work strongly influenced xaringanthemer, supports limited features. can find examples

title: Monotone Theme Maker for Quarto
text: can install development version quartomonothemer GitHub :

title: Monotone Theme Maker for Quarto
text: First, add custom.scss file YAML header. , run style_mono_quarto() inside slide qmd file. produces custom.scss package also provide theme_quarto() based title text fonts. Note provide color maps. need specify scale_*_manual()
code: format:   revealjs:     theme: custom.scss library(quartomonothemer)  font_title <- "Josefin Sans" font_text <- "Montserrat" color_base <- "#0086AB" color_base_light <- "#97D3E3" gray <- "#bebebe" darkgray <- "#6d6d6d"  font_add_google(font_title) font_add_google(font_text) showtext_auto()  style_mono_quarto(   font_title = font_title,   font_text = font_text,   google_fonts = c(font_title, font_text),   color_base = color_base,   color_link = color_base,   color_code = color_base,   path_scss = "/path/to/custom.scss" ) library(palmerpenguins) penguins |>   ggplot(aes(x = flipper_length_mm, y = bill_length_mm,              color = species, shape = species)) +   geom_point(size = 3) +   scale_color_manual(values = c(color_base, color_base_light, darkgray)) +   labs(x = "Flipper Length (mm)", y = "Bill Length (mm)") +   theme_quarto() +   theme(legend.position = c(0.9, 0.1))

title:
Monotone Theme Maker for Quarto
Makes a monotone theme for Quarto revealjs slides and ggplot. — style_mono_quarto
code: style_mono_quarto(   font_title = "Josefin Sans",   font_text = "Montserrat",   font_code = "Fira Mono",   google_fonts = c("Josefin Sans", "Montserrat", "Fira Mono"),   size_font_h1 = "1.6em",   size_font_h2 = "1.3em",   size_font_h3 = "1.15em",   size_font_h4 = "1.0em",   color_base = "#0086AB",   color_text = "#272822",   color_link = "#0086AB",   color_bg = "#ffffff",   color_code = "#0086AB",   color_code_block_border = "#93a1a1",   path_scss = "custom.scss",   size_base = 20 )

title:
Monotone Theme Maker for Quarto
Makes a monotone theme for Quarto revealjs slides and ggplot. — style_mono_quarto
text: font_title Title font font_text Text font font_code Code font google_fonts Google font names. fonts imported custom.scss size_font_h1 Font size h1 size_font_h2 Font size h2 size_font_h3 Font size h3 size_font_h4 Font size h4 color_base Base color color_text Text color color_link Link color color_bg Background color color_code Code color color_code_block_border Color Code block border path_scss Path scss (Default: custom.scss) size_base Base font size ggplot2 theme
